name: M. Rifqi Dzaky Azhad
title: Deep Learning Researcher · Telkom University
tagline: Developed end-to-end ML systems, including a CAD system for bone scan analysis in collaboration with the Radiology Department of Universitas Padjadjaran; a bird species identification app from passive audio recordings for endangered and endemic species in Indonesia and Malaysia in collaboration with Universiti Malaysia Sarawak's Faculty of Computer Science and Information Technology; and a driver fatigue detection system in collaboration with TransTrack and Bandung Techno Park.
